caption: The video captures a nighttime scene outside a house, illuminated by a security camera's night vision. A man is seen running towards the camera across a gravel driveway. He is shirtless and wearing dark shorts. The setting includes two parked cars on the left side of the frame, with a white car closer to the foreground and a black truck further back. To the right, there is a ladder leaning against a structure, possibly a shed or garage, along with some other items like a small table and what appears to be a barbecue grill. The background is dark, with trees and foliage visible, suggesting a rural or suburban environment. The man continues his run directly towards the camera, indicating he might be aware of its presence or simply moving quickly through the area.
